basic_details.job_title: JUVNL Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Jharkhand Urja Vikas Nigam Limited (JUVNL) has officially announced the Medical Consultant (Contract) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 01/2026 on the official JUVNL website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 65 years and hold an MBBS degree from a recognized institution/university along with a valid medical registration number can submit their offline applications on or before 08 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from a recognized institution / University, Valid Registration number as a medical practitioner
qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognized institution / University. Valid Registration number as a medical practitioner.

salary_details.details: As per Finance Department, Govt. of Jharkhand Resolution No. 928 dated 06.04.2022 (duly adopted in Nigam vide notification no. 468 dated 08.05.2026)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JUVNL Medical Consultant (Contract) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JUVNL Medical Consultant (Contract) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the JUVNL Medical Consultant (Contract) recruitment is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by JUVNL?
faq.answer: JUVNL has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Medical Consultant (Contract).

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Medical Consultant (Contract) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized institution/University and a valid registration number as a medical practitioner.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Medical Consultant (Contract) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Consultant (Contract) position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JUVNL Medical Consultant (Contract) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode can candidates apply for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for this post through the offline mode.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Medical Consultant (Contract) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Medical Consultant (Contract) position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Jharkhand Urja Vikas Nigam Limited (JUVNL) is conducting this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected Medical Consultant be posted?
faq.answer: The selected Medical Consultant will be posted in Ranchi, Jharkhand.
